Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurs out of all cases in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation across all process executions
Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that is directly preceded by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation appears immediately after SW-Reviewer Agreed in the variants
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation compared to the frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurrences that are followed by SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Number of cases where SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurs without any prior SW-Reviewer Agreed activity
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not occur

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that include at least one reviewer invitation reminder (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases that experienced reviewer unavailability (e.g., SW-Reviewer Unavailable or SW-Reviewer Declined)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurrences that are part of long-running variants (performance > 1,000,000 seconds)
Metric: the average of the function base > 1000000 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-AE Assign Reviewers across the entire log
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that occurs after multiple instances of SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Number of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation events that occur in cases ultimately resulting in an acceptance decision (e.g., SW-EIC Accept or RW-EIC Accept)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases that underwent major revision (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision) versus minor revision (e.g., SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Percentage of variants containing SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that eventually lead to SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"
